method: 4-approach adversarial design panel (4 research + 4 designs + 16 multi-lens verdicts)

winner.name: Hybrid JWT aud (Approach C enforcement) on static offline-mint substrate (Approach B issuance)
winner.fusion: C's additive Branch-0 + dual-layer enforcement (lowest migration risk) implemented via B's offline-mint script with private key OFF the VM (lowest attack surface, best cobaia fit). No live Authorization Server in v1.
winner.rationale: Cryptographic per-MCP aud binding fixes B11 root-cause (compromised caller cannot reach other MCPs); signs sub server-authoritative (kills fallback_spoofable); 100% additive migration with instant per-caller rollback; no live runtime service on the dispatch choke point; private key never on VM.

C_hybrid_jwt_aud_plus_access_matrix.note: non-security lenses partially scored (judge transcript truncated)

claims.aud: <single MCP id, bare server_name> (RFC 8707 one-resource cryptographic gate)

token_format.aud_convention: bare MCP id == dispatch path server_name (no URI, no canonicalization layer)

key_management.private_key: PC only, .keys/jwt_ed25519_<kid>.pem, gitignored, NEVER on VM
key_management.public_key: VM mcps/gateway/keys/jwt_pub_<kid>.pem, committed, loaded at build_app()
key_management.rotation: kid-based; new pubkey deployed alongside old; regen all tokens; retire old kid after grace; rotation == v1 revocation

validation.signature_change: derive_requester gains server_name param (call site already has it in scope)

access_matrix.role: Layer 2 defense-in-depth + mint-script input + audit/policy source

shared_bearer.disposition: deprecated via existing HERMES_GATEWAY_STRICT_BEARER=true (R5-PHASE3 reuse) in PHASE4-C

phases.name: Infra (issue+validate+dual-accept, dormant)
files: EDIT mcps/gateway/requester.py (Branch 0 + server_name param + pubkey loader + try_validate_jwt)
EDIT mcps/gateway/server.py (pass server_name; load pubkey+flag at build_app; log denied_aud_mismatch/denied_jwt_invalid/token_kind/jti/aud)
phases.acceptance: flag-off byte-identical to today (R5 tests green); flag-on: correct-aud dispatches, wrong-aud 403 denied_aud_mismatch, expired 401, none-alg/ID-token/HS256 rejected; validate_implementation.py >=20/22

phases.name: Migrate callers (dual-accept live)
phases.cobaia_blocking: partial (cobaia callers migrated LAST, owner GO)
phases.acceptance: each migrated caller logs trusted_jwt; 7d zero denied_* per tranche; access_matrix allows each sub; cobaia callers last + verified
phases.rollback: unset HERMES_GATEWAY_JWT_<CALLER>_<MCP> (instant per-caller fallback) OR JWT_ENABLED=false (global)

phases.name: Kill old bearer (JWT-primary)
phases.cobaia_blocking: YES (HARD GATE: 7d clean audit + owner GO + NOT during live cobaia activation)
phases.acceptance: shared bearer -> denied_strict; 7d prior clean audit; rollback STRICT_BEARER=false verified
phases.rollback: STRICT_BEARER=false; per-role bearers never removed until final

risks.mitigation: PC-only never-VM, gitignored 0600, kid rotation, future jti denylist+HSM
jti logged, rotation=revocation, owner may shorten TTL
fail-loud on unknown MCP, explicit inventory, unit test
7d legacy-use audit, generator manifest cross-check, warn-log on legacy use

risks.risk: Key-load failure bricks gateway (fail-closed at choke point)
risks.mitigation: dual-accept, degrade-to-opaque if JWT_ENABLED=false, CI test key-load before merge

owner_decisions.question: Token TTL
owner_decisions.note: shorten to bound leak window vs rotation frequency

owner_decisions.question: Dual-accept duration / PHASE4-C timing
owner_decisions.note: PHASE4-C likely after cobaia Day-14 activation

owner_decisions.question: Live revocation denylist now or later
Private key custody + backup
owner_decisions.note: lost key = regen all tokens; confirm backup

test_strategy: validation happy path (sub from token not body)

rejected.A_gateway_as_idp: live /oauth/token on dispatch choke point; signing key in runtime VM; 34h; cobaia_fit 4. Defer live-issuance/short-TTL to F.5.6 if public MCP appears.
rejected.D_mtls: loopback-only + stdio subprocess + SSH tunnel already provide transport security; mTLS = zero added coverage + cert-expiry outage class
rejected.HS256: shared secret on VM defeats per-target isolation
rejected.remove_access_matrix: kept as Layer 2 + mint input + audit source
